text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
It's finally here, folks! The long-awaited
Unity Cup!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Unity Cup is a competition that runs
concurrently with the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
This team showdown organized by Tracen
Academy will test not only each
individual's abilities, but also their
strength as a team!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, this isn't just a normal
competition!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
We need to save the academy from
certain doom!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Oh my gosh, does that mean we're
heroes?!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I-I don't know if I can do this...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
You'll have us with you, so of course you
can! We just gotta pool our strengths
together and come out on top!

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
Hah. It sure would be nice if that's all it
takes to win.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Do you really think you can topple my
team?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: An epic team showdown is about to begin!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: An epic team showdown is about to begin!
